title: Mining Progress HUD
description: This Mod Show you How much you have mined.
body:
This Mod Show you How much you have mined. 


![pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3018ea0baebf902bf2f08b6315008df9719baf88.jpeg)

You can toggle it with Key { M }
![false](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47ba46a025c625f9f4503bd5b95002d43f6142d6.png)

 
You can change The Key from keybindings. You find it from normal settings!

![setting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c33c5b40937ac9ce3fb7d76c46d6bc938847f1d3_0.webp)


The Mining Progress HUD Team
